title: "your automation has failed due to issues with forbidden access"
excerpt:
Hi 
When I try to add a google calendar integration, I’m getting a red “your automation has failed due to issues with forbidden access”… 
Did anyone here got this message and know how to tackle it? 
Thank you!

posts.author: Lustig (Liran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
When I try to add a google calendar integration, I’m getting a red “your automation has failed due to issues with forbidden access”…

Did anyone here got this message and know how to tackle it?

Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Liran,

Are you able to share a screenshot at the point where you run into the error message? Can you configure it correctly, but when triggered does it then result in the error message? I will take this with our automations team internally

posts.author: Lustig (Liran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.
I just managed to fix it! Thank you very much.
It was something with the permissions of google. I had to connect and give access to the accounts again, and it worked!

Thank you for your help

Liran

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Great to hear - thanks for letting me know!

posts.author: aj092 (Alex Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am also getting this issue. How do you resolve this?

Thanks
